name: WLF_RECOMMENDATION_PROFILES
description: This table stores the details of the recommendation profiles.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDATION_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: System-generated unique identifier1

columns.Name: RECOMMENDATION_PROFILE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Unique number identifier for profile.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Represents the type of recommendation , system generated or user created.

columns.Name: PRIORITY
columns.Comments: Specifies priority for the recommendation profile.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the recommendation profile.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTION_ID
columns.Comments: Represnts the id of the urecommender.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Represnts the type of the recoemmender

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTION_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.Comments: Represents the lookup code for the recommender

columns.Name: RECOMMENDATION_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Represnets the comments for recoomendation profile.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: Represents the name of the recommendation profile

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Represents the description of the recommendation profile

columns.Name: SOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Represent the source type of the recommendation profile

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: Represent the source id of the recommendation profile

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Represents recommendation expansion One-time or Ongoing

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_START
columns.Comments: Represents recommendation scehdule start date

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_END
columns.Comments: Represents recommendation scehdule end date for reconcile

columns.Name: SKILL_VARIANT_CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to SKILL_VARIANT_CONFIG_ID from WLF_SKILL_VARIANT_CONFIG, applicable for "Gaps"/"skills" recommenders

columns.Name: IN_ELASTIC
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate elastic index is reconciled with latest changes.

columns.Name: REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Reason for recommendation profile status change

columns.Name: CREATED_BY_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the person identifier who created the object.

columns.Name: STATUS_CHANGE_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Represents the comments for status change on recommendation profile.

columns.Name: GAP_RECOM_INCL_UNC_ROLE_SKILLS
columns.Comments: Specifies if the uncurated skills should be included related to roles (i.e., Job/position profile) for "Gaps in Current Role" and "Gaps in Careers of Interest" recommenders.

columns.Name: GAP_RECOM_INCL_UNC_RES_SKILLS
columns.Comments: Specifies if the uncurated skills should be included related to resources (e.g., learning item, journey, etc.,) for "Gaps in Current Role" and "Gaps in Careers of Interest" recommenders.

columns.Name: INCL_CATALOG_SEARCH_RESULTS
columns.Comments: Specifies whether to use catalog search to suggest resources that fulfill skill gaps.

columns.Name: PROCESS_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: ESS request id that processed the recommendation profile.

columns.Name: INCL_RES_WITH_OUTCOME_ONLY
columns.Comments: Specifies whether to consider only the resources that writes to profile i.e., have an outcome.

columns.Name: INCL_REQ_ROLE_SKILL_QUAL_ONLY
columns.Comments: Specifies whether to consider only skills and qualifications that are marked as required in the role profile.

columns.Name: ADDITIONAL_INFO
columns.Comments: Captures recommendation profile additional metadata information

columns.Name: INCL_RES_MATCH_SKILL_SYNONYM
columns.Comments: Specifies whether to consider Include resources profiled with skill synonyms
